label: Mixed JP/EN — vendor shipment delay
intent: Tokyo supplier says shipment delayed; new ETA June 5.

event.subject: Re: PO-7781 — shipment delay / 出荷遅延
event.body: Omar-san, 申し訳ございません。PO-7781 will ship late due to customs. New ETA: June 5. We will absorb express fees. Please confirm receipt of this update.
